title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Monarchy, Democracy, and Oligarchy
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Monarchy, Democracy, and Oligarchy.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Monarchy, Democracy, and Oligarchy.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Monarchy, Democracy, and Oligarchy': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
